name: @zcaceres/skill-optimize-skill-activation
description: Audit installed skills and right-size their activation mode — slash-only, model-invocable (name+description in context), or eager-loaded (full body up front). Preview changes, then rewrite each SKILL.md frontmatter. Use when the user says 'optimize skills', 'right-size skills', 'reduce skill tokens', 'audit skill activation', or '/optimize-skill-activation'.
